data.body: PASS 2 verification note: confirmed via _advisory_lock.py that the plan's "What" constants are inaccurate. Live code: lock base 0.2 (:78), factor 2.0 (:79), cap 5.0 (:80); CAS base 0.05 (:101), cap 1.0 (:102), and the CAS function reuses _BACKOFF_FACTOR=2.0 (:425) with no separate _CAS_BACKOFF_FACTOR. Plan states base 1.0/factor 1.5/cap 30.0 (lock) and factor 1.5 (CAS) — none of these match. test_advisory_lock_retry_jitter.py pins CAP_CEILING=5.0 (:165).
